records.statement: The evacuation begins at 06:40 on 14 October 2147.

source.quote: The evacuation begins at 06:40 on 14 October 2147.

records.notes: No scene may depict the evacuation as underway before this time.

records.statement: Mara cannot bear weight on her left ankle until the medical seal is removed.

source.quote: Mara cannot bear weight on her left ankle until the medical seal is removed.

records.notes: The seal remains in place during this scene.

records.statement: The brass key remains sealed inside Locker 12; no character has access to it.

source.quote: The brass key remains sealed inside Locker 12; no character has access to it.

records.statement: Ivo has never met Captain Soren before the docking hearing.

source.quote: Ivo has never met Captain Soren before the docking hearing.

records.notes: The submitted scene occurs before the hearing.

records.statement: The north bridge is closed after the glass collapse and cannot be crossed.

source.quote: The north bridge is closed after the glass collapse and cannot be crossed.

records.notes: Closure persists through the docking hearing.
